otherRequirements: Hold a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) before travel; it is valid for 2 years and allows multiple visits
Pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy (IVL) when applying for the NZeTA
Passport must be valid for at least 3 months after your planned departure date
sourceNote: gov.uk New Zealand travel advice — visa-free visits up to 6 months with an NZeTA (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/new-zealand/entry-requirements)
